name: @rawsql-ts/ztd-cli
description: DB-agnostic scaffolding and DDL helpers for Zero Table Dependency projects

scripts.build: pnpm --filter rawsql-ts run build && pnpm --filter @rawsql-ts/sql-grep-core run build && pnpm --filter @rawsql-ts/test-evidence-core run build && pnpm --filter @rawsql-ts/test-evidence-renderer-md run build && pnpm --filter @rawsql-ts/testkit-core run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @rawsql-ts/adapter-node-pg run build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('../../tmp', { recursive: true })" && pnpm pack --out ../../tmp/rawsql-ts-ztd-cli.tgz && pnpm publish --access public
scripts.test:consumer-validation: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/testEvidence.unit.test.ts tests/testEvidence.cli.test.ts tests/sqlCatalog.evidence.test.ts tests/testCaseCatalog.evidence.test.ts

author: msugiura
